item.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_blade.need: §7Sheath into a Sophisticated Backpack to charge
item.backpack_arsenal.basic_backpack.too: §7A plain backpack without the charging mechanic.
item.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_charger_up: §7Multiplies voltaic_blade charge rate. Contribution +1 (tier 0). Multiplier = 1 + Σ contributions across all installed chargers.
item.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_capacitor_: §7Place on an anvil with a Voltaic Blade to increase max charge by §b+%s§7 per use (up to %s stages, unlimited in creative). Right stack count = stages applied at once.
item.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_blade.capa: §8Hold shears in offhand + sneak + right-click: strip stages & enchants.  §8Anvil with shears: strip stages only (keep enchants, XP cost).  §8Crafting table with shears: same as in-hand.  §8Shears take damage equal to stages stripped.
jei.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_blade.info:
Voltaic Blade — Sheath in a Sophisticated Backpack to charge. Max charge follows MAW rarity; install Voltaic Capacitor Upgrades on an anvil to raise it further (+256/+512/+1024 per stage, up to 5 stages, unlimited in creative).

Stripping with shears (capacitors are NOT returned — they're cut off; shears take damage equal to the number of stages stripped, min 1):
- In hand: hold blade in main hand + shears in off-hand, then sneak + right-click. Removes ALL stages AND ALL enchantments. Unbreaking applies.
- Crafting table: place blade + shears in the grid. Same effect as in-hand; shears stays in the grid with N damage (no Unbreaking — recipe context).
- Anvil: place blade in left slot, shears in right. Strips ALL stages but KEEPS enchantments. Costs XP. Shears returned with N damage (Unbreaking applies).
jei.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_capacitor_u:
Voltaic Capacitor Upgrade — Place on an anvil with a Voltaic Blade.

- I: +256 / use
- II: +512 / use
- III: +1024 / use (strongest)

The right-slot stack count = stages applied at once (XP cost scales with stage). Survival cap: 5 total stages on a blade. Creative: unlimited.

Stripping the blade later (shears required, capacitors are not returned, shears take §enumber of stages§7 damage):
- In hand: blade + offhand shears + sneak + right-click → strip stages AND enchants.
- Crafting table: blade + shears → strip stages AND enchants (in-grid damage).
- Anvil: blade + shears → strip stages only (enchants kept), costs XP.
jei.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_charger_upg:
Voltaic Charger Upgrade — Insert into a Sophisticated Backpack upgrade slot to boost the in-backpack charging speed of any Voltaic Blade.

Multiplier = 1 + sum of contributions across all installed chargers in the backpack.

Tier contributions: base = +1, I = +4, II = +9, III = +16, IV = +25, V = +36.
motion.the_four_primitives_and_weapons.v: Forward AOE slam. Voltaic Blade only; when charged, also calls a simulated lightning bolt at the AOE center.
High-speed back-step wrapped in electric sparks + 1s invulnerability. Voltaic Blade only (DASH slot — selectable alongside dash_rush / leap_slash / shadow_step).
